summary: Patients should not discontinue inhaled glucocorticoids to prevent COVID-19 because doing so could lead to worsened respiratory control and higher risks of exacerbations despite no proven link between corticosteroid use and decreased virus exposure. This advice aligns with current guidelines emphasizing stable disease management over perceived infection prevention benefits from medication cessation.
